string 2: I have awakened. And you better have an iron will!
I've got an iron will.

Then take action. Push your body, your mind,
and your soul to the limit to get stronger!
What do you mean by "will"?

Stepping up and fighting for your beliefs,
not waiting for the fight to come to you.
I think my will's kinda weak.

Good on you for knowing that. No shame there.
But, now you gotta work to get stronger!
I wanna have an iron will.

Well said. Even I've got work to do.
Let's both get stronger together!

I've poured a lot of effort into growing strong.
Compromise is not an option.
Hey, everyone's working hard, too.

Don't compare my efforts with those of others.
No one can ever be like me.
There are lots of strong Digimon out there.

But for most, that's merely innate strength.
My title of "Bancho" was hard-earned.
Good for you.

Is that supposed to be flattery?
It'd take days to list all my great deeds, you know.
I wanna be like you.

If you truly mean that, then put your actions into words.
Don't expect to reach my level with a bit of effort alone.

It is a grave mistake to think that being strong
means you can get away with anything!
But the strong usually do get away with it.

I will teach any who make that mistake
the error of their ways! Even you.
I wanna be both strong and just.

If only all Digimon thought as you do.
There are many of us in need of saving.
It's wrong, but people still do it.

Exactly. That is why I must always defend the meek,
even if I have to do it alone.
We won't stand for it!

Embrace that conviction.
And know that I will always fight to protect the weak!

There are some for whom the only form of salvation
is swift and merciful defeat.
I understand.

It is my form of mercy. I am grateful for your
understanding without interference.
Pretty ruthless, don't you think?

Defeat is salvation for such beings.
I would hardly call it ruthlessness.
Isn't there any other way?

There is not, thus do I judge.
If you have some other way, I will leave judgment to you.
I'd like to help.

Impossible, I fear.
All you have to do is watch my work.
Come see me if ya ever got a problem.
I need your help right now.

Okay, any trouble ya got, me and the whole
Mamemon Alliance will squash it!
A problem? Like what?

Like... anythin'! Whatever!
Just say the word and I'm on it.
You're doing more than enough already.

Glad to hear it. The Digital World's a crazy place,
but I got yer back.
I wouldn't wanna bother you.

Hey, no need to be so formal.
Lookin' out for each other is all part of bein' friends.
